visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white ruffled top and ripped jeans, walks toward the camera while holding a small white Maltese dog dressed in a blue and white outfit. They are in a modern hallway with a red chair and a glass door leading outside. (2) Close-up shot of a hand holding four small 3D-printed figurines, including a version of the white dog, a smaller brown dog, and two mascot-like figures. (3) Outside the storefront of '3D Shots', the same woman in black and another woman in a blue ruffled dress stand with the white dog. They smile and gesture enthusiastically before walking through the door into the shop. (4) Inside the shop, the lighting is bright and warm with orange accent walls. The two women hold hands and spin around happily, showing off the interior which is filled with shelves of figurines. (5) One woman points at a shelf displaying dozens of realistic 3D-printed human and pet figurines of various sizes. (6) In a white, high-tech photography booth lined with dozens of cameras on vertical rails, the two women pose with the dog while a photographer's arm is visible from the side. (7) A sequence of shots shows the dog sitting alone on a circular platform inside the booth, followed by a computer monitor displaying a rotating 3D mesh and texture map of the dog. (8) Back in a domestic-style setting, the women present the final product: customized 'blind box' packaging featuring a cartoon dog and the finished 3D figurines of themselves and the dog inside a clear acrylic case. (9) Close-up shots highlight the intricate details of the miniature dog figurines on a small rotating display stand, showing the texture of their fur and clothing.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Variety]: 想要客製化. [Variety]: 自己的專屬盲盒. [Variety]: 跟我來~. (2) [Variety]: 每個時段只有一組. [Variety]: 所以空間很自在. (3) [Variety]: 還是你. (4) [Subtitle]: 不要側臉唷，要平視著看唷. (5) [Subtitle]: 阿動了，再一次. (6) [Variety]: 完全不會動. (7) [Subtitle]: 帥呆了，這邊可以先預覽. (8) [Slogan]: 我們的專屬盲盒完成了. [Slogan]: 比爾跟66. [Slogan]: 穿鮮豔的顏色. [Slogan]: 阿六4歲組. [Variety]: 細緻. [Logo]: 3D Shots. [Variety]: 獨一無二. [Variety]: 當下寫真公仔呦.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators, 1 male photographer/staff member visible during the shooting process.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has long black hair and wears a black cut-out top; the second woman wears a light blue ruffled tiered dress and a zebra-print bucket hat.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video moves between a modern minimalist lobby, a retail shop with vibrant orange walls and display shelves, a technical 3D scanning booth with white panels and camera rigs, and a home-like setting with white cabinets and soft lighting.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced electronic pop music begins with a bright synth melody. A female narrator speaks with a high-pitched, enthusiastic tone and rapid speech rate. (2) A sharp 'Pop' sound effect triggers as small figurines are presented, followed by a 'Magic sparkle' chime. (3) Multiple camera shutter clicking sound effects occur in rapid succession as the characters pose in the booth. The music continues at a steady 128 BPM. (4) A male voice briefly provides instructions with high clarity and a friendly professional tone. Another round of shutter sound effects follows. (5) A celebratory 'Ta-da' stinger plays as the final blind box product is revealed. The female narration increases in arousal and valence. (6) High-frequency 'Ding' sound effects and 'Whoosh' transitions punctuate the close-up shots of the figurines. The music builds to a final chord before cutting off.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to promote a personalized 3D printing service named '3D Shots' by showcasing the fun experience of visiting the store, the high-tech photography process, and the high-quality, sentimental value of the final customized 3D figurines and blind box packaging.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video explicitly names the brand '3D Shots', shows the storefront, explains the service process in detail, and encourages viewers to visit the shop to make their own figurines.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A highly polished promotional vlog utilizing social-media-native editing styles, vibrant text overlays, and energetic sound design to drive engagement for a unique custom product service.
